requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Coastal Suitability for Cape Verde PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据及佛得角光伏逆变器沿海适用性
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據及維德角光伏逆變器沿海適用性

summary.en: Cape Verde solar PV inverter safety files should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. For grid-connected island projects, EPC contractors, ARME/ELECTRA reviewers, and lenders may also request environmental evidence for coastal exposure, including salt-mist or corrosion resistance, enclosure rating, thermal derating, and installation/maintenance instructions in Portuguese. Safety documentation should identify the exact model family, power rating, firmware/hardware revision, protection class, isolation design, enclosure rating, and any limits on installation near marine environments.
summary.zh: 佛得角太阳能光伏逆变器安全文件应围绕IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系统用功率变换器型式试验证据准备。对于并网海岛项目，EPC承包商、ARME/ELECTRA审查方和贷款方还可能要求沿海暴露环境证据，包括盐雾或防腐、外壳防护等级、热降额以及葡萄牙语安装/维护说明。安全文件应标明具体型号系列、功率等级、固件/硬件版本、保护等级、隔离设计、外壳防护等级以及靠近海洋环境安装的任何限制。
summary.zht: 維德角太陽能光伏逆變器安全文件應圍繞IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2光伏系統用功率轉換器型式試驗證據準備。對於併網海島項目，EPC承包商、ARME/ELECTRA審查方和貸款方還可能要求沿海暴露環境證據，包括鹽霧或防腐、外殼防護等級、熱降額以及葡萄牙語安裝/維護說明。安全文件應標明具體型號系列、功率等級、韌體/硬體版本、保護等級、隔離設計、外殼防護等級以及靠近海洋環境安裝的任何限制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
IEC 61701 or IEC 60068-series environmental testing where salt-mist or coastal corrosion exposure is specified
IGQPI standards practice and ARME/ELECTRA project review expectations

summary.en: China-side safety documentation for PV inverters often relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, factory declarations, and domestic voluntary certificates. These documents may cover important safety concepts, but they do not automatically demonstrate IEC 62109-1/-2 conformity for Cape Verde project review. They also may not cover the coastal salt-mist, enclosure corrosion, Portuguese documentation, and island maintenance assumptions required by Cape Verde projects.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工厂声明和国内自愿性证书。这些文件可能覆盖重要安全概念，但不能自动证明满足佛得角项目审查所需的IEC 62109-1/-2符合性，也可能未覆盖佛得角项目所需的沿海盐雾、外壳腐蚀、葡萄牙语文件和海岛维护假设。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、工廠聲明和國內自願性證書。這些文件可能覆蓋重要安全概念，但不能自動證明滿足維德角項目審查所需的IEC 62109-1/-2符合性，也可能未覆蓋維德角項目所需的沿海鹽霧、外殼腐蝕、葡萄牙語文件和海島維護假設。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: supplement China domestic safety certificates with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the exact inverter family, plus site-specific environmental evidence where coastal exposure or high humidity is relevant. Provide Portuguese-language installation, operation, and maintenance instructions and document any derating or spacing requirements for hot, humid, salt-laden island sites.
gap.zh: 差距：应以具体逆变器系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告补充中国国内安全证书，并在涉及沿海暴露或高湿度时提供场址特定环境证据。请提供葡萄牙语安装、运行和维护说明，并记录炎热、潮湿、含盐海岛场址的任何降额或间距要求。
gap.zht: 差距：應以具體逆變器系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告補充中國國內安全證書，並在涉及沿海暴露或高濕度時提供場址特定環境證據。請提供葡萄牙語安裝、運行和維護說明，並記錄炎熱、潮濕、含鹽海島場址的任何降額或間距要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for IEC/EU-style Cape Verde PV project specifications and commonly required by EPC, lender, ARME/ELECTRA, or owner review
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-specific in China; GB/T/NB/T safety evidence is not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 evidence for Cape Verde

source.publisher: IGQPI (Instituto de Gestao da Qualidade e da Propriedade Intelectual)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China-only GB/T or NB/T safety file is not a complete Cape Verde PV inverter safety package. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence, Portuguese installation documents, and coastal salt-mist or derating support where the island site requires it. Confirm model-family coverage and environmental assumptions with the Cape Verde project reviewer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件不是完整的佛得角光伏逆变器安全文件包。请准备IEC 62109-1/-2证据、葡萄牙语安装文件，并在海岛场址需要时提供沿海盐雾或降额支持。出货前请与佛得角项目审查方确认型号系列覆盖和环境假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件不是完整的維德角光伏逆變器安全文件包。請準備IEC 62109-1/-2證據、葡萄牙語安裝文件，並在海島場址需要時提供沿海鹽霧或降額支持。出貨前請與維德角項目審查方確認型號系列覆蓋和環境假設。
